title: Docs + verification + Phase 5 COMPLETE milestone marker
predecessor: M35-T9 shipped 2026-04-20 (commit 23f3b1b — 'test(m35): M35 T9 — flaky-test audit + stable selector sweep'). Added NEW apps/desktop/src/e2e-regression-guards.test.ts with 2 vitest guards (+2 unit → 1166). Fixed rag-flow.spec.ts waitForTimeout(500) → expect.poll on teamx.rag.stats.embeddingCount > 0. Added [data-copilot-toolbar-toggle] stable-selector anchor to 6 specs (copilot-service, meeting-flow, rag-flow, smoke, ticket-flow, vault-backup). Adjacent hardening: top-bar.test.tsx TS2532 latent-from-T8 on badgeMatch![1].trim() fixed by switching to `badgeMatch?.[1]?.trim() ?? ''` + biome format sweep collapsed 2 multi-line call blocks. Full verification green: 1166/1166 vitest (+2 target hit exactly), 12/12 Playwright cases across 11 specs in 41.5s, typecheck clean across 6 packages, 0 lint errors / 24 warnings (baseline preserved). Unit baseline now 1166. E2E baseline 11 spec files / 12 Playwright cases (unchanged from T2). Predecessors T0 (da4ce1f) → T1 (b68d09b) → T2 (1108247) → T3 (51393f8) → T4 (0f8b51c) → T5 (3cffe29) → T6 (a966deb) → T7 (cb0ab4c) → T8 (a8dc98e) → T9 (23f3b1b).
goal: Final task of M35 AND final task of Phase 5. Pure docs + release-marker milestone: (a) flip CLAUDE.md Phase 5 status line from 'in progress' to 'Phase 5 (Intelligence Layer) — complete. All 8 milestones shipped (M28 → M35). v1.1.0.'; (b) flip Phase 5 design doc §9 M35 row from 📋 Planned → ✅ Complete with shipped commit SHA range; (c) append a 'Phase 5 COMPLETE' section to .loki/CONTINUITY.md (top-of-file); (d) NEW docs/user-guide/demo-walkthrough.md (external-facing copy of the M35 T5 demo script under docs/demo/, promoted from internal → user-facing); (e) 3 unit tests pinning the release-marker strings via source-string audit per M35 T3 convention; (f) full Phase 5 exit verification — Node ABI rebuild → pnpm test (1169) → typecheck → lint → Electron ABI rebuild → test:e2e (11 specs / 12 cases) → pnpm build → pnpm dist:win smoke-launch against release/1.1.0/ installer; (g) tag v1.1.0 AFTER the ledger commit lands. Tests delta: +3 unit (1166 → 1169). Zero code-path changes; markdown + test scaffolding only. After T10 ships, M35 is complete, Phase 5 is complete, v1.1.0 is tagged, and the next session opens Phase 6.
acceptance: CLAUDE.md top-of-file Phase 5 status lines flipped from 'Phase 5 (Intelligence Layer) — in progress. M35 next.' (or current in-progress phrasing) → 'Phase 5 (Intelligence Layer) — complete. All 8 milestones shipped (M28 → M35). v1.1.0. Phase 6 (scope TBD) is the next milestone.' Under the 'Status' section the M35 summary paragraph lands with the same density as M33/M34 summaries (one dense paragraph, Rocky-voice, no cutting corners). Upstream history preserved verbatim — do NOT re-author M28–M34 summary text.

docs/plans/2026-04-13-team-x-phase-5-intelligence-layer.md §9 M35 row 📋 Planned → ✅ Complete with shipped commit SHA range (T0 da4ce1f → T10 <self-SHA>). §13 Decisions Log gains an M35 row if one is missing; otherwise updated in lockstep with the §9 flip. Markdown table formatting preserved — stray spaces or mis-aligned pipes will desync columns.

NEW docs/user-guide/demo-walkthrough.md — external-facing condensed copy of docs/demo/phase-5-walkthrough.md (M35 T5). Strip loki/CONTINUITY mentions, internal-only links, and anything that assumes a dev machine. Must read as a coherent user-facing demo any new user can follow.

.loki/CONTINUITY.md gains a 'Phase 5 COMPLETE (2026-04-20)' section at the TOP (not bottom) with a one-paragraph summary — baseline delta 612 unit / 4 E2E (v1.0.0) → 1169 unit / 11 E2E spec files / 12 Playwright cases (v1.1.0) — M28 through M35 enumerated as the additive shippable surface. One-sentence Phase 6 handoff: 'Phase 6 scope TBD; next session authors docs/plans/2026-0X-XX-team-x-phase-6-<theme>.md.'

3 unit tests at apps/desktop/src/phase-5-completion-freeze.test.ts (source-string audit style per M35 T3/T8/T9 convention — vitest env 'node', no jsdom, no React rendering): (1) CLAUDE.md first 2000 chars match /Phase 5[^.]{0,200}complete/i and do NOT match /Phase 5[^.]{0,200}in progress/i; (2) docs/plans/2026-04-13-team-x-phase-5-intelligence-layer.md §9 M35 row matches /\|\s*M35[\s\S]{0,400}✅/; (3) .loki/CONTINUITY.md first 2000 chars contain the literal 'Phase 5 COMPLETE'.

Full verification gate (CLAUDE.md recipe): (1) Node ABI rebuild — cd node_modules/.pnpm/better-sqlite3@11.10.0/node_modules/better-sqlite3 && npm run install; (2) pnpm test → 1169/1169 pass (1166 + 3); (3) pnpm typecheck → clean across all 6 workspace packages; (4) pnpm lint → 0 errors / ≤24 warnings; (5) Electron ABI rebuild — pnpm -F @team-x/desktop exec electron-rebuild -f -w better-sqlite3,keytar; (6) pnpm -F @team-x/desktop test:e2e → 11 spec files / 12 Playwright cases green in ≤45s; (7) pnpm -F @team-x/desktop build → production bundle succeeds; (8) pnpm dist:win → v1.1.0 installer lands under release/1.1.0/; smoke-launch + visually verify Phase 5 badge, palette (Cmd+K), Copilot sidebar (Cmd+Shift+K), both system seats present, no console errors, no unresolved migrations.
Atomic commit: `chore(m35): M35 T10 — docs + verification + Phase 5 COMPLETE marker`.

Ledger commit: `chore(loki): M35 T10 — commit ledger (<sha>)` — roll orchestrator.json tasksCompleted 10 → 11 + phaseComplete false → true + completedAt set + inflight cleared + current.unitTests 1166 → 1169 + current.asOfTask M35-T9 → M35-T10 + history.M35 block created mirroring M30–M34 structure. pending.json tasksShipped 10 → 11 + T10 pending → shipped + all M35 tasks shipped. current-task.json overwritten with a Phase 6 T0 bootstrap stub (awaits human scope input).

Tag commit: `git tag -s v1.1.0 -m 'Team-X v1.1.0 — Phase 5 Intelligence Layer'` (signed if GPG configured; unsigned tag acceptable if not). Tag lands AFTER the ledger commit, pointing at the ledger commit SHA — that is the last Phase 5 commit.
No feature code. No IPC changes. No bus events. No migrations. Any code-path change is out-of-scope and gets filed as a Phase 6 deferred.
outOfScope: NO feature code — T10 is a pure docs + release-marker task.
NO landing-site badge update — docs/site/index.html does not exist in this repo.
NO Phase 6 scope authoring — Phase 6 T0 (plan-doc authoring) happens in a separate session with Rocky's scope input.
NO retroactive edits to T0–T9 commits, the Phase 5 plan doc narrative beyond the §9 + §13 flips, or the M28–M34 history paragraphs.
NO sweeping refactors triggered by things surfaced during verification — file follow-ups as Phase 6 deferreds.
carryForward: 'DO NOT invent' rule from T7/T8/T9 carry-forward continues. M28 + M29 still have no [Unreleased] entries and that remains intentional — do NOT backfill.
Source-string audit convention (T3 / T8 / T9) is the preferred style for the 3 T10 unit tests — vitest env 'node', no jsdom, no React rendering, regex on file content.
Atomic work commit + separate ledger commit cadence restored by M35 (each task T1–T9) — T10 follows the same pattern.
Verification recipe: Node ABI → vitest → typecheck → lint → Electron ABI → Playwright → build → dist:win smoke-launch. No shortcuts.
surpriseWatch: (a) The Phase 5 design doc §9 M35 row is inside a markdown table — one stray space or misaligned pipe will desync columns. Verify with a preview render before committing.

(b) pnpm dist:win pulls native modules; electron-builder will cross-fail if better-sqlite3 or keytar was last built for Node-ABI. Always rebuild for Electron before running dist (step 5 of the recipe, before step 8).
(c) The v1.1.0 git tag must point at the T10 LEDGER commit, not the atomic work commit — the ledger commit is the last commit on Phase 5.
(d) If the Phase 5 design doc §13 Decisions Log does NOT yet have an M35 row, add one; if it DOES (unlikely), update the shipped commit SHA.
(e) Full suite re-runs are cheap; don't skip any. The cost of a broken release-marker tag is orders of magnitude higher than the minute of re-verification.
risks: Forgetting to flip the CLAUDE.md Phase 5 line leaves the repo in an ambiguous 'in progress but v1.1.0 tagged' state — the T10 unit test #1 is the belt-and-suspenders guard against this.
Tagging v1.1.0 before the ledger commit lands would orphan the ledger changes from the tagged SHA. Commit-order discipline: atomic → ledger → tag.
Running dist:win on a Node-ABI-built native module produces a non-launchable installer — smoke-launch catches it but wastes the dist pass.
commitTemplate: chore(m35): M35 T10 — docs + verification + Phase 5 COMPLETE marker
expectedDuration: 60–90 minutes (docs edits + 3 unit tests + full verification recipe + dist:win smoke-launch)
notes: T10 is the last Phase 5 task. After T10 ships, M35 is complete, Phase 5 is complete, v1.1.0 is tagged, and the next session opens Phase 6. First Phase 6 session authors docs/plans/2026-0X-XX-team-x-phase-6-<theme>.md; scope TBD. Candidate themes surfaced from deferred follow-ups include cross-company copilot aggregation, proactive copilot → autonomous action, agent-to-agent negotiation, and post-release telemetry digest. No Phase 6 scope work in T10.
